scripts.check: pnpm openapi:lint && pnpm openapi:check:ts && pnpm openapi:check:go && pnpm typecheck:tokens && pnpm typecheck:mobile && pnpm test:mobile && pnpm test:api
scripts.openapi:check:go: git ls-files --error-unmatch openapi/oapi-codegen.yaml openapi/oapi-codegen.public.yaml && pnpm openapi:generate:go && git ls-files --error-unmatch services/api/internal/openapi/openapi.gen.go services/api/openapi/openapi.gen.go && git diff --exit-code -- services/api/internal/openapi/openapi.gen.go services/api/openapi/openapi.gen.go
scripts.openapi:check:ts: pnpm openapi:generate:ts && git ls-files --error-unmatch apps/mobile/src/lib/api/generated/schema.ts && git diff --exit-code -- apps/mobile/src/lib/api/generated/schema.ts
scripts.openapi:generate:go: go tool oapi-codegen -config openapi/oapi-codegen.yaml openapi/openapi.yaml && go tool oapi-codegen -config openapi/oapi-codegen.public.yaml openapi/openapi.yaml
